mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.last_message, s.last_message_time, CASE WHEN s.user_id_1 = #{userId} THEN s.user_id_2 ELSE s.user_id_1 END AS peer_user_id, CASE WHEN s.user_id_1 = #{userId} THEN s.unread_count_1 ELSE s.unread_count_2 END AS unread_count, u.name AS peer_user_name FROM t_message_session s LEFT JOIN t_user u ON ( CASE WHEN s.user_id_1 = #{userId} THEN s.user_id_2 ELSE s.user_id_1 END = u.id ) WHERE s.user_id_1 = #{userId} OR s.user_id_2 = #{userId} ORDER BY s.last_message_time DESC
